{{Quote|I appeal to your sensibilities developed as a revered Jedi. I was witness not only to your practiced brand of diplomacy during the Sevarcos Dispute of three decades ago, but also of your former apprentice's noble efforts to protect the sovereign of my world. From these examples, I know you are a proponent of peace.|[[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] address to [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] over the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]]|<ref name="Hnn48" />}}
The '''[[Sevarcos II|Sevarcos]] Dispute''' was a conflict resolved by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] in [[52 BBY/Legends|52 BBY]].
